:::{.hero}
:::{.hero__brand}
![SciLifeLab](img/SciLifeLab_Logotype_NEG.png){.hero__logo}
:::

:::{.hero__copy}
:::{.hero__title}
Open Science in the
Swedish Context
:::

:::{.hero__subtitle}
Implement Open Science practices into every step of your research project
:::
:::

:::{.hero__actions}
{{< include _generated/hero-actions.qmd >}}
:::
:::
